'''Bimmiel''' was the leader of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] survey team that discovered the [[MZX33291 system]]. Its main planet, [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]], was named after him.<ref name="Onslaught" />

{{Char-stub}}
